hero.title: Kaşifler Diyarı
hero.subtitle: An Educational Game That Teaches Children Creativity, Curiosity, and the Spirit of Exploration

about.title: What is Kaşifler Diyarı?
about.description: Kaşifler Diyarı is an interactive game designed for children ages 4-12 that develops curiosity and exploration skills. Through completing various missions, children develop problem-solving abilities, unleash their creativity, and discover the joy of learning.

items.title: Educational & Fun
items.description: The perfect combination of learning and play

items.title: Social Development
items.description: Cooperative game mode to play with friends

items.title: Problem Solving
items.description: Various challenges that develop logic and strategic thinking
